In a moment, we're going to ask if you can make your first contribution to Warren Democrats before Monday's midnight fundraising deadline. But first, we wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:

So far, Elizabeth has endorsed over 100 Warren Democrats running up and down the ballot. And it's going to take real resources to make sure we can help them win in November.

So we've set an ambitious fundraising goal to fuel our robust organizing plan. With that plan in place, we'll help kick Donald Trump and his Republican enablers out of office and start making big, structural change in 2021.

But whether or not we reach this goal depends on the number of grassroots supporters who chip in before Monday's deadline.

It's a big goal. But we know we can reach it together.

**[We're only asking because your continued support right now would be powerfully important: If you're in a place to donate today, will you chip in $2 or whatever you can to help grow our movement and hit our goal before Monday's deadline?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525060/45c30650/1c394832c/66e82a93/2523280344/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE4Rl9FT01fRUdSX0NfMjAyMDA4MjlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU18F_EOM_EGR_C_20200829_V1S1_P")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

# You Don't Know the Cost to Mail a Postcard?
| | |
### Friends,

Rep. Katie Porter, D-Calif., quizzed DeJoy about the cost of stamps and other postal rates this past Monday. The postmaster general told her that he knew a first-class stamp costs 55 cents, but he said he didn't know the cost to send a postcard.

**Speaking of costs, do you know how much it costs to win a seat in Congress? **

House candidates who won in the past had to bring in an average of $1,689,580 in campaign contributions. Women and moms who are not independently wealthy have a much harder time fundraising as they don't have access to a network of wealthy donors. I founded Moms in Office to help elect more women like Katie Porter, well-qualified hard-working women who will fight for working families in Congress and won't take no for an answer.

But we are falling behind and if we don't raise a considerable amount over the weekend, we will miss our most important fundraising deadline on 8/31.

You are an integral part of this organization's success and all of our endorsed candidates' success which is why I must ask you today:

**If you are able to, will you split[ $10](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=58becc387c&e=3f151f8b74) between Moms in Office and Congresswoman Katie Porter's campaign? We can do this, but we must do it together. Thank you for your support. **

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

---

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: Our supporter record for Peter Willis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Trump and the RNC outraised us last month, and we can't let that happen again. |
---

Peter, things have been _pretty busy_ this month.

**FIRST** : Joe announced Kamala Harris as his running mate, and Democrats united at our convention focused on building a better, brighter future for all Americans.

**THEN** : Donald Trump and the RNC hosted a convention focused on scare tactics and demanded four more years of their corrupt administration.

**NOW** : We're heading into our first PUBLIC filing deadline as a full ticket, and we need to raise another $202,500 from first-time donors in Pennsylvania by 11:59 pm tomorrow night to hit our ambitious August end-of-month goal.

**Peter, Trump and the RNC outraised us last month, and we can 't let that happen again -- especially not for our FIRST public deadline as a ticket. And our only shot at outraising them in August is to hit this goal.**

[Can we count on you to chip in and be one of the new donors we need to hit our goal by tomorrow night? Based on your supporter record, $25 from you would make a huge impact today.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS") | **Biden-Harris Supporter Record** **Supporter:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

The Republican convention couldn't have been more different from our convention, Peter.

**And we 've got to make sure that it's our message of hope and inclusion that reaches voters, not their scare tactics.**

But if they outraise us for the second month in a row, they can drown us out on airwaves across the country.

So if you can pitch in anything at all today, it will be that much more that we can put towards voter outreach in the critical battleground states we need to win this thing and elect Joe and Kamala.

[If you're able to give, please pitch in $25 now >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.28_B4_FTNEOM_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners_RS")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3b3/510615018/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3b0/510615018/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3af/510615018/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3b2/510615018/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3ae/510615018/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3b1/510615018/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b0a8/1cd0ac28/153e7d682/3570a3ad/510615018/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b087/1cd0ac28/153058899/3570a3c5/540608153/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b087/1cd0ac28/153058899/3570a3c4/540608153/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b087/1cd0ac28/153058899/3570a3c3/540608153/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b087/1cd0ac28/153058899/3570a3c4/540608153/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

# We're Endorsed By Our Revolution Maryland
---
| | [ Watch the Video of our Endorsement! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/199429?id=160331.957.1.79dc56315a4a36abdebbf77a7e63464a&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE1OTgxODQ5Mi0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My0xMTdhNzY2ZTZjMjA2OTBhYWVhZjhmY2M0YzZhZjQxNTIwOGVhMjYzIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjE2MDMzMSJ9)
---
We, at the Mia Mason campaign, are excited to announce an endorsement from Our Revolution Maryland. Our Revolution is a grass-roots group working to "win progressive issue fights, elect progressive champions, transform the Democratic Party, and get big money out of politics." The group was created in the wake of Bernie Sanders' 2016 run in order to continue his progressive revolution throughout the country. Mia is thankful for their support and ready to move forward with their help to complete our combined mission of helping working people to live with dignity and prosper. We know that the fight to win in November is going to be hard. We must remember that while it is hard, it is not impossible. It's groups like Our Revolution Maryland that show us how possible it can be for progressive candidates to win in unlikely places. The reason progressives are winning all across the country is that we are winning the fight on the issues. The majority of Americans support Medicare for All, ending for-profit prisons, police reforms, Green New Deal legislation, and the list goes on. We have won on the issues and now we must seize the opportunity and win in November as well. With Our Revolution Maryland's help along with you, we can make it happen. Please consider donating to help push forward a bold progressive vision for the first district:

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: ICYMI: MIKE ALLEN ON 700WLW: “KATE SCHRODER IN THE HOTSEAT” FOR “BALD FACE LIE”
body:
Host Slams Democratic Congressional Candidate For “Getting Caught With Her Hand in the Cookie Jar” With “Flat Out Lie”
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-r/) **ICYMI: MIKE ALLEN ON 700WLW: "KATE SCHRODER IN THE HOTSEAT" FOR "BALD FACE LIE"**_Host Slams Democratic Congressional Candidate For "Getting Caught With Her Hand in the Cookie Jar" With "Flat Out Lie"_ In case you missed it, attorney for Congressman Chabot Brian Shrive appeared today on "Saturday Midday" with Mike Allen on 700WLW to discuss the lawsuit recently filed against the dishonest campaign of Democratic candidate Kate Schroder. The discussion details the egregious nature of Schroder's dishonesty, meant to distract from her record of scandal, failure and corruption on the Cincinnati Board of Health.**Mike Allen (Host):** "Kate Schroder the challenger, she's now in the hotseat for airing a 30 second ad... that is, there's no other way to say this people, it's a bald face lie. There's no other way to say it. And it's defamatory and she got caught with her hand in the cookie jar... It's just a damn lie... Steve Chabot never faced a grand jury investigation, that's the crux of it... For the Schroder campaign's trouble, they are now in Hamilton County Common Pleas Court defending a defamation lawsuit... I've been around awhile, I've never seen this happen before, where a campaign actually sues another campaign for defamation... if this is a test case, I don't think you can have a better one."**Brian Shrive (Attorney for Congressman Chabot):** "[In] Kate Schroders introduction to the voters of the first district, she decides... to go into the gutter and lie... Steve Chabot and his campaign are the victims... Kate Schroder knew that this was false and at the very least acted with a reckless disregard... [Schroder has] done real damage to our political discourse."**Mike Allen (Host):** "A Gutsy decision to file the defamation lawsuit... [it was] just a flat out lie, it's not just a little white lie, you simply cannot say publicly, in a political ad or any other public forum for that matter, that someone, a candidate, a sitting congressman is under a federal grand jury investigation when they are in fact not under a federal grand jury investigation, when they are in fact the victim."Listen to the full interview on 700WLW [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-y/).Read more on the lawsuit against Kate Schroder and her dishonest campaign [HERE](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-j/).### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkuyiyjk-kujkulhluu-d/)

clean_body: Host Slams Democratic Congressional Candidate For “Getting Caught With Her Hand in the Cookie Jar” With “Flat Out Lie” No images? ICYMI: MIKE ALLEN ON 700WLW: "KATE SCHRODER IN THE HOTSEAT" FOR "BALD FACE LIE"Host Slams Democratic Congressional Candidate For "Getting Caught With Her Hand in the Cookie Jar" With "Flat Out Lie" In case you missed it, attorney for Congressman Chabot Brian Shrive appeared today on "Saturday Midday" with Mike Allen on 700WLW to discuss the lawsuit recently filed against the dishonest campaign of Democratic candidate Kate Schroder. The discussion details the egregious nature of Schroder's dishonesty, meant to distract from her record of scandal, failure and corruption on the Cincinnati Board of Health.Mike Allen (Host): "Kate Schroder the challenger, she's now in the hotseat for airing a 30 second ad... that is, there's no other way to say this people, it's a bald face lie. There's no other way to say it. And it's defamatory and she got caught with her hand in the cookie jar... It's just a damn lie... Steve Chabot never faced a grand jury investigation, that's the crux of it... For the Schroder campaign's trouble, they are now in Hamilton County Common Pleas Court defending a defamation lawsuit... I've been around awhile, I've never seen this happen before, where a campaign actually sues another campaign for defamation... if this is a test case, I don't think you can have a better one."Brian Shrive (Attorney for Congressman Chabot): "[In] Kate Schroders introduction to the voters of the first district, she decides... to go into the gutter and lie... Steve Chabot and his campaign are the victims... Kate Schroder knew that this was false and at the very least acted with a reckless disregard... [Schroder has] done real damage to our political discourse."Mike Allen (Host): "A Gutsy decision to file the defamation lawsuit... [it was] just a flat out lie, it's not just a little white lie, you simply cannot say publicly, in a political ad or any other public forum for that matter, that someone, a candidate, a sitting congressman is under a federal grand jury investigation when they are in fact not under a federal grand jury investigation, when they are in fact the victim."Listen to the full interview on 700WLW more on the lawsuit against Kate Schroder and her dishonest campaign .### | | | ---|---|--- Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: Sean Herring
subject: The choice is clear
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Se97aXfDxiLLkI9FIfpsYp-3cA0wApPsx7L54eLNKfg=/2CqC8K7a5oZKsHTkVCKlnsYN6Y6UsEDDvr0KdYWoCZE=?refcode=082920)
| | Friend, Now that both the Democratic and Republican National Conventions are behind us, the choice of who should lead the country and our state is clear. Democrats highlighted a strong and unified partnership between Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, an aggressive plan to tackle COVID-19, and a bold progressive vision for our country. In contrast, **the Republican convention highlighted more divisive politics of Donald Trump and reckless Republicans.** We know Trump intends to win Minnesota this year -- he came very close last time. Mike Pence was even in town yesterday. **All this money and attention will only make our task of protecting and growing our House Majority even harder.** Will you make an investment in our movement today? [**Make a contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Se97aXfDxiLLkI9FIfpsYp-3cA0wApPsx7L54eLNKfg=/2CqC8K7a5oZKsHTkVCKlnsYN6Y6UsEDDvr0KdYWoCZE=?refcode=082920) For me, the choice is clear. Will you join us? Thank you for being a part of our team. **Sean Herring** Campaign Manager Minnesota House DFL Campaign

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18919702/243902633/1788719826?refcode=workinghero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjNDExNzhhLWQxZWEtZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=veg8E7n1X810XJ2ZdU0MevqVzBKUuFM7uxjcYWBocbg=) Hi Peter, We are at a fragile moment in our nation’s history. The coronavirus pandemic has exposed and exacerbated the dysfunction of our healthcare system, unemployment is at record levels, and the climate crisis gets worse every day. In less than a week, the people of Massachusetts will head to the ballot box to vote on whether America will rise to these challenges. And with their vote, they will make a choice: continue a political aristocracy or elect a battle-tested leader who has spent decades fighting for a greener planet and a more just future for all. I think the choice is clear. That’s why I’m proud to [endorse progressive champion Senator Ed Markey ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18919709/243902640/380051990?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjNDExNzhhLWQxZWEtZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=veg8E7n1X810XJ2ZdU0MevqVzBKUuFM7uxjcYWBocbg=&emci=be2fb9f5-49ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=5c41178a-d1ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=7114755)for re-election to the United States Senate. Our nation values people who put their heads down and get to work, who rise to every occasion, who build themselves from nothing -- people who make hard choices against all odds. People who fight for the betterment of the whole. No candidate better embodies those American ideals than Senator Ed Markey, and it is imperative that we send Senator Markey back to Congress. I hope you will join me in [donating](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18919711/243902642/1788719826?refcode=workinghero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjNDExNzhhLWQxZWEtZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=veg8E7n1X810XJ2ZdU0MevqVzBKUuFM7uxjcYWBocbg=) to his campaign and propelling him to victory on Tuesday. | | [Support Ed Markey! ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18919715/243902647/1788719826?refcode=workinghero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjNDExNzhhLWQxZWEtZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=veg8E7n1X810XJ2ZdU0MevqVzBKUuFM7uxjcYWBocbg=)

I feel confident we’ll win. Because people are fed up with the empty gestures that have come from our cultural, media, economic, and political institutions.
To really fix what’s wrong with this country, we need across-the-board reform. And when institutions fail us, we have to build new ones.
That’s why I co-founded Aspiration, an online financial institution that helps people align their money and their social conscience.
We shouldn’t settle for anything less than a future where everyone can afford life’s basic needs and live with self-determination and dignity.
I’m starting this newsletter [\-- Horizon --](https://click.everyaction.com/k/18919728/243902649/-1209334604?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwMy8xLzc0NDg5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVjNDExNzhhLWQxZWEtZWExMS04YjAzLTAwMTU1ZDAzOTRiYiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=veg8E7n1X810XJ2ZdU0MevqVzBKUuFM7uxjcYWBocbg=&emci=be2fb9f5-49ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=5c41178a-d1ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=7114755) on Substack to talk about how we move past rhetoric and toward real, lasting change for working people.
I hope you’ll join me. In solidarity,
Joe

Dear Friend, We're making steady progress - $3,129 to go to reach our August goal. **[Can you help us get there with a quick donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18921754/243933064/-1907457920?refcode=RKC_083020_em_fr_all_eoq2_Line2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGNiZDRkYy1kYWVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJXXuWNY5gwiUG_fg2fycKqGBqhoR8ioIa6LxglqFvg=)** The pandemic is restricting our ability to gather people together, so your contributions will support everything we need to do to reach voters where they are through -
* Direct mail
* Digital ads
* Materials for no-knock block walks
* Phone banks
* Television ads
* On-line town halls

Making our August goal will set us up for success in September and October. And it's critical that we succeed or we risk losing our representation in Washington to an ethically challenged outsider who was moved here like a pawn on a chess board by interests who are **UN** interested in the well-being of Central Texans or the health of our democracy. name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Our health is at stake in this election, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18922146/243944067/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzcxODJkMS1kZGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSi3SLQKaRs8Irsdx9IsCltftykKhnhdU5RQPJeNiR8=)
---
|
Friend --

**I’ve said from the beginning that a lot is at stake for Texas families in this election.**

As the coronavirus continues to inflict damage on our community and economy, instead of providing any solutions, Texas Republicans are suing to kill the Affordable Care Act, which would rip health care away from millions of Texans. It is clear that our health care and our safety is on the ballot this November.

We have a choice in this election -- and our opponent, Troy Nehls, is not the right choice for this moment.

As a disgraced sheriff who was fired from a Texas police department after numerous offenses -- including tampering with evidence -- Troy Nehls is not the leader for this moment or any other.

Repeatedly, throughout this campaign, we’ve seen examples of his unhinged behavior and reckless disregard towards public safety. He spent this summer dismissing the coronavirus crisis and attacking a survivor of human trafficking on social media -- who he failed in his role as sheriff.

Friend -- my campaign spent this summer listening to YOU and mapping out ways to better serve our community. I spend every day focused on how I can provide better health care options to our community and get our economy back on track.

**The residents of TX-22 simply deserve better. You and I both know it, and that’s why I’m so grateful to have you on this team.

If you're able to, I hope you’ll consider a donation to our campaign as we push forward in these final weeks.** [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020augeom**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18922147/243944068/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzcxODJkMS1kZGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSi3SLQKaRs8Irsdx9IsCltftykKhnhdU5RQPJeNiR8=)

-Sri

* * *
_Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18922148/243944069/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzcxODJkMS1kZGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSi3SLQKaRs8Irsdx9IsCltftykKhnhdU5RQPJeNiR8=&emci=262a99a0-d7ea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=137182d1-ddea-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18922149/243944070/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzcxODJkMS1kZGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSi3SLQKaRs8Irsdx9IsCltftykKhnhdU5RQPJeNiR8=)

**Sri Preston Kulkarni** is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | [Help send Sri to Congress! ➜](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18922150/243944071/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_SPK_b1_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzcxODJkMS1kZGVhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZSi3SLQKaRs8Irsdx9IsCltftykKhnhdU5RQPJeNiR8=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
As the daughter of immigrants, a working mother, and a former labor lawyer, I'm acutely aware of the needs of CA-38's working families. That's why I've made it my mission in Congress to fight for policies that will _actually_ make a difference in the lives of everyday Americans.
**Now, I 'm running for re-election so I can continue standing up for the folks of CA-38. Want to know more about my record? [Check out my newly released campaign video >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/YtHNFgD9qNxWFwxZQ_pTnT4ZowCN-Q_J99IWT6p7a9k=/nIRJMGJIjKZNmIaPSv4da6mCG6nBiKH3KknHIivlwxE=?refcode=X_083020_EOM_E)**

I don't need to tell you how much is on the line in November.
This moment requires competent, empathetic leaders to guide us through our ongoing health crisis and to mend our country's deep divisions.

body:

Friend,

As our campaign ramps up for the general election, we need to increase our voter outreach budget -- which is why we’ve set a big, $25,000 goal before the end of the month. Vote by Mail ballots are about to arrive in voters’ mailboxes and we need to reach them with our message before they cast their vote.

name: Kevin Hern
subject: We’re fighting back TWICE as hard!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
We just got approval to DOUBLE all donations made before September! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f8f92ad847af3649/5eac203d15c3a36cc3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, Exciting news! I just spoke with my finance team, and we have been authorized to DOUBLE all donations made from now until midnight on August 31st. Will you help out by chipping in today? [**DOUBLE YOUR IMPACT! >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/f8f92ad847af3649/d64bd0e6b6c33fe6c3d6b838967d376c/34143) It is more important than ever during these trying times to unite the Right and fight back against the Democrat machine - even here in Oklahoma. They won the 5th district in 2018, and now they are looking to keep it and pick up even more.
Nancy Pelosi has already been funneling money into our state, and we know what she thinks of conservatives. She openly called us “domestic enemies of the state.”
We can’t let Pelosi and her Socialist Squad win in the heartland. Please donate today and DOUBLE your impact to help us keep Oklahoma **RED**. body:
Did you see Nick’s email? This district is definitely flippable. But not without your help. | | | Friends – Did you see Nick’s email? This district is definitely flippable. But not without your help.

Dana is counting on our grassroots team to power this campaign to victory and finally give our community the fighter in Congress we deserve.

She’s ready to deliver much-needed progress on affordable health care, economic opportunity, government reform, and more – are you with us? [**Chip in a few dollars before midnight on Monday to help us close the month strong!**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=ce90e746c2&e=e25784ff28) | **[DONATE](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=2204d186d3&e=e25784ff28)**

— Preston

| | Friends , we’re firing on all cylinders to hit our August end-of-month goal that will assist us in reaching voters across GA-11 – and right now, we need your help more than ever before.

Barry Loudermilk’s inaction and self-serving “leadership” is unacceptable. It’s time our communities have a voice in Washington who will truly fight for ALL of us.

We can beat Barry and send Dana to Congress – but only with your help. We must raise another $4,047 by midnight on Monday in order to reach and mobilize every voter that we can. [**If you are able, can you chip in a few dollars today to help us do that?**](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=0d098cbbc9&e=e25784ff28) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Doug_Emhoff_=28Kamala=E2=80=99s_Husband=29?=
subject: No strangers to a fundraising goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It's been a little while since I've had to write an email like this but the stakes are higher than ever. |
---

Peter --

It's been a little while since I've had to write an email like this, but the stakes are higher than ever, so I'll get right to it:

[The first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the general election is tomorrow. Can you chip in before then to make sure Joe and Kamala hit their goal?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Kamala and I are no strangers to a fundraising goal, Peter. Throughout each of her campaigns -- for California Attorney General and U.S. Senator -- we saw the power of grassroots donors chipping in $5, $10, or whatever they could afford to power her campaign and make sure we had the resources we needed.

But this deadline is different. Now that the conventions are over, August's end-of-month fundraising deadline is officially the first deadline of the general election. Whatever we raise this month will then be publicly reported, and we need to show just how strong a position this campaign is in to defeat Donald Trump in November.

And for me, it's personal -- I can be a competitive guy sometimes, and I'd love to say that in Kamala's first month on the ticket, we were able to outraise Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and the Republicans.

**Peter, according to the finance team's latest records, we still need to raise $292,500 from Pennsylvania before tomorrow night to make sure we hit our goal.**

[Can you make your first donation to the Biden-Harris campaign right now to power this campaign, and make sure we raise the resources we need before midnight tomorrow?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | [$25 ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B1_dougeom_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&express_lane=true")

Let's do this,

Doug
(Kamala's hubby)

| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a08b/3229457680/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a08a/3229457680/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a089/3229457680/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a088/3229457680/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a087/3229457680/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a086/3229457680/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a085/3229457680/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a084/3229457680/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a083/3229457680/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a082/3229457680/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a085/3229457680/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a081/3229457680/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a084/3229457680/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b08d/1cd0ac28/1534fe3f0/3570a080/3229457680/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: End of August deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/04898ca79ff2/end-of-august-deadline?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
At the beginning of August, we decided to **double** our fundraising goal for the month, and unless we pick up our fundraising pace, we are in danger of falling short. **If we hit this goal, we will be able to fully fund our ad campaign, which is more important now than ever before.** We need to make sure that every voter in the 16th hears our message because, as you know, when a voter hears our message, they recognize that better representation is possible. [We can only do this with your help. If you can, please chip in $10, $15, or however much you’re able to. ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8f249d92ea&e=140a9b81e7) When I am in Congress, I will fight for universal healthcare, clean energy jobs, campaign finance reform, LGBTQ+ rights, and a woman’s right to choose. My Republican opponent’s record is awful on all of these fronts:**he votes 94% of the time with Donald Trump.** He has made it clear that he does not answer to the people of the 16th.**It is time to kick him out of Congress.** However, he is flooding the airwaves, so the people of this district don’t know the atrocity that is his voting record. With only 66 days left until Election Day -- or Victory Day, if you donate -- the campaign is quickly picking up. That is why it is so important that you contribute to my campaign. [I hope I can count on you to help us reach our August goal so that we can go on the air.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b595299cd7&e=140a9b81e7) Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Before I ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Before I ask if you can make a donation to support Warren Democrats right now, I'd just like to talk about what we saw at last week's Republican National Convention. | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525063/45c30650/1c3859874/66e8299e/1931591495/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Before I ask if you can make a donation to support Warren Democrats right now, I'd just like to talk about what we saw at last week's Republican National Convention.

We saw a president who has ignored science, fanned the flames of racism, shoveled trillions to giant corporations, and employed fascist tactics. And we saw a parade of so-called "leaders" who've stood by his side.

So we need to defeat Donald Trump this November, but that's not all. We need to sweep his Republican enablers out of office, too -- at every level of government.

That's why I've now endorsed over 100 Warren Democrats running up and down the ballot.

**From now through November 3, we need to do everything we can to not just win the White House, but also to take back the Senate, expand our House majority, flip state houses, and elect local leaders who will put people, not special interests, first.**

**[If you're able to make a donation to support our mission of electing bold reformers and making big, structural change, please chip in $2 or whatever you can right now. Tomorrow is our next fundraising deadline, and your contribution would go a long way towards helping hit our goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525063/45c30650/1c3859874/66e82981/1931591495/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200830_V1S1_P")**

We all need to be in the fight to win big this November.

And after November, we all need to stay in the fight to get big things done.

We stay in this fight so that when our children and our grandchildren ask what we did during this dark chapter in our nation's history, we will be able to look them squarely in the eye and say: we organized, we persisted, and we changed America.

So I'm in this fight all the way. And however you're able to keep up the fight -- whether it's by pitching in a few hours a week as a volunteer, or by making sure your friends, family, and neighbors are all ready to vote safely, or by chipping in a few bucks, I'm deeply grateful.

[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, will you donate before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline to help hit this powerfully important August fundraising goal?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525063/45c30650/1c3859874/66e82981/1931591495/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200830_V1S1_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525063/45c30650/1c3859874/66e82981/1931591495/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE2Rl9FT01fRVdEX0VfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU16F_EOM_EWD_E_20200830_V1S1_P")

subject: working together

body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
We need to raise another $9,320 by midnight tomorrow to meet our August fundraising goal. Please consider making a donation and helping us get there. As we get closer to the election - early voting starts in 45 days! - giving to a state party is so important. Here's why:
Creating a cooperative coordinated campaign that works for all our candidates is by far the most efficient way to work together and get the most out of Tennessee Democrats’ resources. From the top of the ticket to the bottom - having shared media spends and Get Out the Vote outreach infrastructure cuts costs for everyone and helps Democratic Candidates get ahead. And so, from now until Election Day, the TNDP is focusing our resources on GOTV and building a robust cooperative campaign. This election is not the time for Democrats to sit on the sidelines. Winning is too important.
Will you help us reach our August goal by donating right now? It really makes a difference, and we are so grateful for your continued support. We couldn’t do any of this without you. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

Hey Peter, quick update:

I just ran the numbers and we're _slightly behind_ where we need to be to hit our 350 new donor goal. I'm reaching out personally because this team has always helped us out in the past.

**This is NOT the time to play it safe.** MJ is just ONE POINT behind Senator Cornyn in the polls, and if we can tell more Texans her story _she will win_. But it's going to be tough to communicate our message across Texas' 20 media markets, especially when we can't knock on folks' doors. So we're relying on our grassroots supporters more than ever.

Look Peter, you don't want to wake up the day after the election wishing you'd done more. **Can you help us out by rushing a donation before tomorrow 's deadline?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Today, can you help?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
We're falling behind |
---
**I'll make this quick, friend: We're falling behind.**

Remember: We set a goal of raising $100,000 by the end of August. This is a **_crucial_** fundraising deadline with less than 70 days to go and Early Voting beginning soon.

We can't fall behind now.

**[Mitch McConnell's super PAC is spending more against me than any other Democratic U.S. Senate candidate. But if everyone reading this right now chips in a small donation, we'll be able to hit back twice as hard>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2493/5b2c1286/381a3d13/25f0c721/942099194/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd?refcode=em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd")** | | [CHIP IN $20 IMMEDIATELY](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2493/5b2c1286/381a3d13/25f0c720/942099194/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd?refcode=em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd&amount=20")
---

**_We can't let Mitch McConnell, David Perdue, and their big money backers outraise us, friend._**

They're corrupt. And they're spending their ill-gotten campaign contributions to stop us.

I will make ending political corruption a top priority in the Senate, friend -- but I need your continued support to win. _We have to meet all of our goals from here on out._

**Friend, we have to stay on offense** \-- that means getting back on track for this $100,000 goal, with just two days left.

**[So I'm asking you personally: Can you pitch in $20, $10, $5, or whatever you can TODAY?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2493/5b2c1286/381a3d13/25f0c721/942099194/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd?refcode=em_2020_08_30_jon_eom_bhnd")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20For=20Biden=2FHarris?=
subject: This Monday's Deadline
body:
Help Moms in Office Elect Joe Biden in November | | | |
---
|
---
| [Chip in ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3c0b8af446&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in ")
---
| | |
### Friends,

August has been an exciting month as we witnessed the historic nomination of Kamala Harris and watched the Democratic National Convention.

Moms in Office supports Biden/Harris because with their leadership we can finally achieve true equality for women. Too many working mothers are struggling to put food on the table and take care of their children due to the lack of affordable child care.

Child care in America was broken before Covid-19 and if we want to rebuild our country after this crisis, we will need a President who has an [_agenda for women_](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a15d26febf&e=3f151f8b74).

But time is running out before the critical end-of-month fundraising deadline on Monday. We are in the final stages of this election and it is crucial that we meet this deadline.

**Would you help us elect Biden/Harris in November by[ chipping](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=d6ef79801b&e=3f151f8b74) in what you can? **

Moms can no longer tolerate Donald Trump's reckless leadership and we need you to stand with us. With just under a week before the first votes are cast, we need you to help us send a strong message because moms had had enough.

**Can you split a[$10](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=98a5d9d0b0&e=3f151f8b74) donation between Joe Biden and Moms in Office? **

Thank you and stay safe!
Moms in Office

| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8139%2E868730%2EtGNBUO) Friend, I've said time and time again that it was only a matter of time before dark money GOP groups turned their massive war chests toward us -- and that time has come. Earlier this week, a conservative group put an ad up on TV attacking Jay for his leadership during the COVID-19 pandemic. His stay-at-home order is saving lives, but to this group? name: JoshHicksKY.com
subject: Folks in Washington are too out of touch with people here at home
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
With less than 10 weeks until Election Day, here’s what folks are saying about our campaign.

|
---

| | Josh is in this race for all the right reasons, friends. Josh is running to be a representative for the 6th District, not another politician, because he knows that folks in Washington are out of touch with folks back home. **That’s why we are so grateful to our supporters. You’re the reason we’ve been able to get Josh’s message out, the reason we got up on TV first, and the reason folks in the 6th District are hearing what Josh has to say. name: Betsy Rader
subject: Meet Judge Jennifer Brunner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hi Peter,

Tuesday evening I'm hosting an event for Judge Jennifer Brunner in support of her race for Ohio Supreme Court. As former Ohio Secretary of State she knows the importance of fair elections, and her qualifications are just what we need at a time when Ohio faces legal issues regarding gerrymandering and corruption. If we win both Supreme Court seats this year, it will have a Democratic majority and restore some balance to Ohio government.

I'd love for you to join us and learn more about how you can help. All the details are below, or email my campaign manager, Ethan, with any questions [(ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/a33s2Twnx9h8S4FHsYZ_8z7tq2lmH9gOrVVUKcXZjww=?subject=A%20Fair%20Ohio%20Event%20with%20Judge%20Brunner))

Thanks for your support and hope to see you there!

Warmly,
Betsy
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Betsy Rader** <[betsy@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/W3hMA3XUWW5fomPgRMRkc4GcZTnlDwp4BwOxLEXa3QI=)>
Date: Sat, Aug 27, 2020
Subject: A Fair Ohio - An event for Judge Jennifer Brunner
To: Peter <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/lTEfFfeKAbscaxBSp4cY3wtuxkGuF-mSMYUotTUKqCk=)>
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Next week, I'm hosting a free, virtual event to introduce you to **Judge Jennifer Brunner, **who formerly served as Ohio Secretary of State and is now running for the incredibly important position of Ohio Supreme Court Justice. Among many important cases that are decided by this Court, a critical issue likely to go before the Ohio Supreme Court is the way in which our congressional and state legislative districts are re-drawn in 2021. Democrats won two seats on the Ohio Supreme Court in 2018, and if we win the two seats on the ballot this year, the Court will have a majority of Democrats! **As we saw in [Virginia](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/UGiPO-wDh-pjTJYKH2AenA4r8jC3x6NBahwpEzI1Mf8=) and [Pennsylvania](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/Z-PCd2hUjf5R2qgm_lQ55pJpwpHdOl4exXG0tcTDqIY=), after the legislature re-draws the districts under our new Ohio laws, the new districts may be challenged in court. That's why electing someone as qualified and fair as Judge Brunner can change the future of democracy in Ohio.** It is a vital race and I hope you will join us on September 1st at 6 pm to learn more about it and the ways you can help. Republicans are working hard to get all of their judges elected and we have to do the same! [RSVP by clicking here and signing up](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/jMson4Dg0Nk5ZuqE9pFyWexMKxFkpkAi723iy_quXLw=), or e-mail my campaign manager Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/lTEfFfeKAbscaxBSp4cY3wtuxkGuF-mSMYUotTUKqCk=?subject=A%20Fair%20Ohio%20virtual%20event%20)). I look forward to seeing you!
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/CPLpeDW82tXpPBPBxpr-4s__lrNCDj8TYAnWapDGozA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/2a96ZQJpt_nhGHI_yZFGuThak8nTwgM917nYSlnZcX0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/T8OI802lHBV6xG_vJg7A5tDnrOsQjPI6lug8t9sxUcw=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/lDNGQArn5N3BXX4PxcPqu-zrr0rVxp7OV2wG4qLzBKY=/f1aaDdrGkYy3XuBtLR2y23Ulzq0KjK-tIpHzrWTNf_M=)
---

---

subject: American cities are crumbling

body:

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Mv_wAc0kE105fb80yqVb39cObM_UMQsrzRG_mk1m6EJoF3_sFDzfgQ_5lML_t9O-czhD7W7jw9nrSWO6UQ4fyxnhBCDlQnmVf6TAOxV7nL9SsbQQuT7s_3A0MEvFexNIMs7OZGE4Ph82fnV3YwBk_WVvhx8yRl1X1BVBUIxKmYW3h2LfUElypA==&c=ug_QLPGs36KGNvvFsC6F9Z4k6pDUAwsrTz1riTorAwai5tzv4Hn9aw==&ch=WPs4WGl2uItsZEmR2FFszGD7LvPvYXdOHueyEW5zaIfyshgOZkICHw==)

| Patriot,
We are sick and tired of turning on the nightly news and seeing great American cities being taken over by violent left-wing mobs. Democrat mayors across the country have given in to ANTIFA and the far-left who show no signs of slowing down their destruction.
Livelihoods are being destroyed by looters and thieves. Violent crime is skyrocketing. And all the while these far-left mobs are calling for the defunding and dismantling of our police.

name: Seth Moulton
subject: A direct ask before my primary on Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | Friend, My primary election is on Tuesday and I need your help, but first let me tell you why:
1. I want to continue my work in Congress speaking up for our communities, supporting our veterans, battling the mental health and opioid crises, and working towards common-sense solutions on the biggest issues facing our country.
2. I want to continue fighting for our District and the rest of our beautiful state.
3. This is a bizarre election cycle and we can’t afford risking a Trump-approved Republican winning this seat.

[**It’s essential that I win this election, but we can’t take anything for granted. Will you make a contribution to my re-election campaign to make sure I stay in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18926602/244049647/2005830277?refcode=20200830_SM_Primary&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODQ0ZTdhNi0wNWViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KZdawYxrVNupfXULGf_wzmRx3BZe1Wym28KOLDcKt7s=) This has been one of the strangest election cycles I can remember. Instead of talking with voters face to face, shaking hands, and meeting new people, I’ve been on non-stop Zoom calls—like most of the rest of the world. It’s been difficult to connect and especially difficult to get the word out about our September 1st elections. I’m asking for your help today to make sure I can return to Congress and continue my work on behalf of you, your neighbors, and all of the constituents of the Sixth District. I need your help to make sure I can keep battling the opioid crisis, building a coalition to make real progress on climate change, ensuring everyone has health care as a right, and fighting for investments and good jobs across our District. [**Now’s the time to finish this race as strong as possible. Please contribute whatever is meaningful to you right now ahead of my primary on clean_body: | | | Friend, My primary election is on Tuesday and I need your help, but first let me tell you why: 1. I want to continue my work in Congress speaking up for our communities, supporting our veterans, battling the mental health and opioid crises, and working towards common-sense solutions on the biggest issues facing our country. 2. I want to continue fighting for our District and the rest of our beautiful state. 3. This is a bizarre election cycle and we can’t afford risking a Trump-approved Republican winning this seat. = This has been one of the strangest election cycles I can remember. Instead of talking with voters face to face, shaking hands, and meeting new people, I’ve been on non-stop Zoom calls—like most of the rest of the world. It’s been difficult to connect and especially difficult to get the word out about our September 1st elections. I’m asking for your help today to make sure I can return to Congress and continue my work on behalf of you, your neighbors, and all of the constituents of the Sixth District. I need your help to make sure I can keep battling the opioid crisis, building a coalition to make real progress on climate change, ensuring everyone has health care as a right, and fighting for investments and good jobs across our District. = Thank you for whatever you can do, Seth = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. * North Carolina's 6th District is one of the **top 10 congressional seats most likely to flip** in 2020.

* North Carolina is one of **the most competitive and expensive battleground states** in the country. More than _$20 million_ has already poured into our state.

Kathy

Hey team,

I’m about to hop on the phone with Eugene and the rest of the team, but I wanted to touch base with you first. We’re about to discuss the special interest money that’s been flooding our race and our strategy for fighting back.

You see, so much of what we can accomplish in these final weeks -- how many ads we can air, how many calls we can make, and how many voters we can reach -- rests on meeting each and every fundraising goal along the way. **But as of right now, we’re staring down a $7,736 budget gap with only 24 hours to make up the difference.**

But as of right now, we’re staring down a $7,736 budget gap with only 24 hours to make up the difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you so much, Rachele Rachele Fortier Campaign Manager Eugene for Congress We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Eugene DePasquale is running for Congress to represent Pennsylvania's 10th district. To learn more, please visit . Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: This campaign is powered by people, not special interests. Chip in any amount to help Eugene flip PA-10 blue in one of the most competitive races in the entire country. | = | Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10 DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. Box 1822 York, PA 17405 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Tomorrow night's public fundraising deadline is quickly approaching. |
---
Peter,

The donations we receive over the next two days will make **the most impact** on our September outreach budget -- and decide how many voters we can talk to next month.

But we only have until midnight tomorrow to raise $270,000 more from first-time donors in Pennsylvania to make sure our September budget is fully funded (and to make sure Trump and the RNC don't outraise us for the second month in a row).

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b082/1cd0ac28/15375f8fe/3570af28/943402229/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29a/18e32a7f/4a1d8447/7b20fb31/311817262/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. body:
I wanted you to hear it from me, Peter
|
---

| | Peter, I wanted you to hear directly from me before tomorrow's deadline.

Right now I'm coming up $8,390 short of my goal.

I've always been able to count on my supporters in your community, but I noticed you haven't chipped in yet, Peter.

This is going to be one of the tightest races in the country for Democrats.

Even one more donation could be the tipping point that allows me to hit my goal, and win.

**[So Peter, I'm asking you to make your first $5 donation now before my End of Month Deadline: ](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee32/4075257192/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200830_em_fr_b1_kara_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**

If you donate using this link, I will be personally notified! >>**_[https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Last-Chance#Peter Willis](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee32/4075257192/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200830_em_fr_b1_kara_all_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Thanks for your support,

Kara
---
|
---
[](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee3d/4075257192/VEsD/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.facebook.com/eastmanforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee3c/4075257192/VEsA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://twitter.com/karaforcongress") [](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee3f/4075257192/VEsB/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://www.instagram.com/karaforcongress/")
Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee3e/4075257192/VEsO/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee39/4075257192/VEsP/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e825/77d4c309/219a2e89/2635ee38/4075257192/VEsHBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

| | Paid for by Eastman for Congress

subject: what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri just sent you an important email detailing exactly how consequential this election will be for the health and safety of our district.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18927515/244078302/-1466533491?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_MG_b2_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzAxMTJmZC0xMGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpHkcHSVAR6zpxcK6GqMlz1-YQRKEW-srczqHYRyRIE=)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18927516/244078303/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_MG_b2_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzAxMTJmZC0xMGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpHkcHSVAR6zpxcK6GqMlz1-YQRKEW-srczqHYRyRIE=)
Hey Friend --

Sri just sent you an important email detailing exactly how consequential this election will be for the health and safety of our district.

**Simply put, we can’t afford to let Troy Nehls win this seat and put our lives and livelihoods at risk for political gain.**

That’s why the stakes of this election are so high -- and why we need to meet our end-of-August fundraising goal by our deadline **tomorrow night**. We’re going to make sure that voters all across the district hear our message and join our broad grassroots coalition -- [**and we can only do that with your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18927517/244078304/138045847?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.30_MG_b2_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzAxMTJmZC0xMGViLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WpHkcHSVAR6zpxcK6GqMlz1-YQRKEW-srczqHYRyRIE=)

| | We're going to brag a little bit here. We've got a pretty incredible Online Mobilization program, Peter. When COVID-19 hit, we adjusted quickly. Now, we've got hundreds of active volunteers texting and calling thousands of Texans every day.

That's a good start, but we need to do more -- much more. **[Our end-of-month goal](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fd6/7f51f7bc/4250753c/4efae8db/1142080091/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200830.2nd__2002__&amount=10")** is way more than just a number. It's about keeping our Online Mobilization program funded and expanding it through Election Day. If we reach this goal, it'll help power our grassroots team to make _more_ phone calls, send _more_ text messages, and reach _thousands more_ undecided voters!

**[Pitch in to help support our Online Mobilization program and reach the 34% of Texans who are still undecided.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891fd6/7f51f7bc/4250753c/4efae8db/1142080091/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwMDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augusteom-nd?refcode=email_20200830.2nd__2002__&amount=10")**

**Reaching this goal means more people will hear from MJ -- and it means more people will vote for her!** We're counting on grassroots donors just like you to come through for us so we can give every volunteer the tools they need to organize EVERYWHERE in Texas.

**Will you donate and give MJ the best shot possible to win this ONE-POINT race?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Betsy R.
subject: This deadline has real stakes.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
Peter, Hitting our August fundraising goal is so important and this is why: About a month ago, polling was done for this open seat in the State Senate...and I'll be honest- I was nervous. This is not a safe democratic district. It's gerrymandered and it's one that Trump won by a lot in 2016. _**Which is what makes the results so much more exciting.**_ _According to the poll, I 'm already in a statistical tie with our opponent--and after voters hear more about both candidates, I win (by quite a few points!!)_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/KBdNmbAwLz1acERdgR30l3gSv_cYrSQjCc7LFu3AnXA=?refcode=poll2) **The good news: **we can win this seat! **The bad news:** we have to make our budget. The only way we win is if we communicate with voters - which is harder when you don't take corporate PAC money ([unlike my opponent](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/4reH56G-76OfxCuuuo6l1Ow6QF-W0zFXAYh3Mms39z0=)). We have to pay in order to get our message out and we have to start right away. Paid digital ads are one of the best ways to reach a wide group of people and share our message. **[We have an end-of-month deadline tomorrow, and we're just shy of where we need to be for our next digital ad. We need to raise another $2,160 for the ad, which will reach hundreds of people. I hope I can count on you for $15 today to help us get there.](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/DcsvNn1Cc-YWVe7XJrwHbpPWQMnyCShtlLh0TVB3ATY=?refcode=poll2&amount=15)** Click the buttons below to make a donation today. Thanks so much for your support - which we know from our polling is really making a difference up & down the ballot. Sincerely, [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/KBdNmbAwLz1acERdgR30l3gSv_cYrSQjCc7LFu3AnXA=?refcode=poll2&amount=15) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/KBdNmbAwLz1acERdgR30l3gSv_cYrSQjCc7LFu3AnXA=?refcode=poll2&amount=25) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/DcsvNn1Cc-YWVe7XJrwHbpPWQMnyCShtlLh0TVB3ATY=?refcode=poll2&amount=100) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/FzZ7HE-1B-0Jg6VnDwuk-6B0PHxQa4HVWwofrDJjDJQ=/KBdNmbAwLz1acERdgR30l3gSv_cYrSQjCc7LFu3AnXA=?refcode=poll2)

Re: Our critical fundraising deadline tomorrow |
---
Friend -- it's Elias, Jon Ossoff's Digital Director here in Georgia.

**_I just got off a call with our finance director, and we've fallen critically behind on our August fundraising goal._**

So let me cut right to the chase and spare you the hyperbole:

**We need to raise $50,000 in grassroots donations in the next 24 hours so we can continue to fund critical parts of our campaign.**

**[Friend -- can you chip in $5, $10, or ANY amount RIGHT NOW so we can keep up our momentum in Georgia to take back the United States Senate?>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e249a/5b2c1286/38010311/25f0c5c9/2120141680/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_eliasd?refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_eliasd")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

But the GOP will do *anything* to stop Democrats from winning in Georgia -- _Mitch McConnell's super PAC is already spending more money to defeat Jon Ossoff than any other Democratic candidate!_
