name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: Closing out August strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

At the end of this email, I'm going to ask you to consider supporting Mark Warner's re-election campaign, but first, let me explain why.

I want to thank everyone who has made a donation -- this week, this month, this year. Thank you for showing your continued support for Mark and for the entire team that's kept us going through these unprecedented times.

As I look forward to Labor Day, I'm thinking about how, normally, Mark and our team would be running around the Commonwealth: shaking hands in Buena Vista, participating in Bobby Scott's cookout, and talking with Democratic committees across Virginia.

This campaign has been anything but normal -- our country is facing really challenging times. Keeping Mark's constituents safe and healthy has meant that things look different this year: the vast majority of our events have gone online, and we've had to rethink how our field team is contacting voters and getting them information on how to safely cast their ballot.

Our team is working hard to make up the difference -- and I'm so proud of our progress. We are determined to press forward and spread Mark's message to folks across the Commonwealth, while keeping our team and Mark's constituents as safe as possible.

**In moments of uncertainty like the ones we've faced this year, we need leaders like Mark, who are willing to roll up their sleeves and work until the job is done and every Virginian has the resources they need.** Mark is fighting in the Senate to address all of the crises facing our country: coronavirus, record rates of unemployment, and systemic racism, while laying the groundwork to make sure that everyone has the ability to safely cast their vote come November.

**We need your help to re-elect Mark and keep Virginia blue in 2020.** I know that many folks in the Commonwealth and around the country are facing hardship, but I'm asking that you consider supporting real leadership for Virginia if you have the means.

**[Any amount you can give today will help us meet our critical end-of-month goal and make a difference in the campaign to re-elect Mark Warner.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db09/53d9897e/55d5f0d8/1c883a3d/190058920/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-jennyaug?refcode=20200830_f_2_nd__742__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")** Thank you so much for your support.

-- Jenny, Finance Director

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db09/53d9897e/55d5f0d8/1c883a3d/190058920/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc0MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-jennyaug?refcode=20200830_f_2_nd__742__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db09/53d9897e/55d5f0d8/1c883a3c/190058920/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

body:
You've heard from us a lot this week, but we're up against our first PUBLIC fundraising deadline of the general election with our full ticket. |
---
Hey Peter,

You've heard from us a lot this week, but we're up against our first PUBLIC fundraising deadline of the general election with our full ticket. Our fundraising numbers for August will be locked tomorrow at midnight and wherever we land will be made public for Trump and everyone else to see.

[Here's why we need you to chip in $25 right now:](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

**If** we don't raise $247,500 more from first-time donors in Pennsylvania by midnight tomorrow, we won't hit our goal.

**If** we don't hit our goal, we might get outraised by Trump and the Republicans for the second month in a row.

**And if** we get outraised, Trump could use that advantage to drown out our message of hope and unity and to claim that there isn't excitement around Joe and Kamala as the Democratic ticket.

[It doesn't have to be this way, Peter, but we need to act now. That's why we're asking you: If you're able, will you be one of the first-time donors we need from Pennsylvania to chip in $25 today?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B4_if_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&express_lane=true")

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2f/3583994964/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2e/3583994964/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2d/3583994964/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2c/3583994964/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2b/3583994964/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2a/3583994964/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac2d/3583994964/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b081/1cd0ac28/154cf60f2/3570ac28/3583994964/VEsFBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Darin LaHood
subject: fwd: did you see what Pelosi said?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Nancy Pelosi has completely abandoned any sense of bipartisanship by labeling Republicans as “enemies of the state.” Friend, Did you see Darin’s message yesterday?
Nancy Pelosi has completely abandoned any sense of bipartisanship by labeling Republicans as “enemies of the state.”
Americans are desperate for leadership – not partisanship – right now, and that’s not going to happen as long as Nancy’s in Washington.
Darin is committed to taking Congress back on November 3rd and getting Washington on the same page again, but with time ticking down in this election season, he needs your support.
Can we count on you to help take back Congress ahead of our August 31st fundraising deadline? Friend,

Dysfunction, division, and obstruction in Congress have reached all-time highs under Nancy Pelosi’s leadership – and it’s only getting worse by the day.

_Did you hear her comments about Republicans earlier this week?_

**She labeled us as “enemies of the state” after we refused to go along with her $25 billion bailout of the postal service.**

Americans in all 50 states are sick and tired of Pelosi’s partisanship holding back American progress at a time when Congress needs to be coming together and finding solutions to lead the country forward.
[**CHIP IN TO FIRE NANCY PELOSI**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=509d8ab7fd4f44b8bc9922be5e80d072&_e=kEmZJZFA_-7IgCDZIuzuvg30A3PFgPgqGjGOfEW4o15wL40R5zAEErL5EYZ2TGon1y3CwPiwCsdAoyAcV-yu_-rfAYfVGPccfXQUfEqM9AHFAczieGMMjbIAIlE-L7-ty2PlcZYAimJuKd9-5lYDc1D3LobIAO-h9he-iNVPR51MOmri4V-AqpXJOqG5cRqyMTwxtdyDTQVMAE0NbqX42boxyoRgVO417HlpxpMmgVKR4nCcr9oGAO1dvJG9RUECMjNOmB5MB_R85NOlmVQ0v-xUNUHgHP6SFGsjaL08vEth0aeSNCidzpSS8-D3hyuuG8ZqhvoIG8p2iGMVLXomqsLQNX1CZ4Wr_FwOkRAbzZTgGRpj5eA6tJBd2KuqR1iMmW2cUVLtJuLOWbWgS3FkS9eNK4u18Y4HXS6df4dv_DG8xEszRznubV0SKtAy_KNuq4xiJShrJDCzp6Vc3aHhUzCh6DkjUbw-S6Qdf7dO0PES3RkUe2vN9LFqKPxoOFd4)
November 3rd is our chance to turn the page, right the ship, and get Congress back on track for years to come – but we’re rapidly running out of time in this fight.

Friend, Election Day is right around the corner, August is coming to a close this week, and our end of month fundraising deadline is staring us down.

Elizabeth has a plan.

A plan to grow our grassroots movement across the country. A plan to help elect Warren Democrats in races up and down the ballot. A plan to win big this November and start making real, systemic change in January.

But first, that plan requires hitting our August fundraising goal by midnight tomorrow. And that's only going to happen if grassroots donors decide to make it happen.

**[If it makes sense for you right now, will you make a donation to support Warren Democrats before tomorrow's deadline? $2 or whatever you can contribute would go a long way to help hit this critical goal.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852507b/45c30650/1c360129d/66e8d2c5/3032899937/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE5Rl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU19F_EOM_EGR_T_20200830_V1S2_P")**

Together, we can win back the White House, flip the Senate, grow our House majority, and win state and local races across the country -- with Democratic candidates who know that we can't just nibble around the edges of the problems we face.

That's how we'll put our government on the side of working people.

**By donating to Warren Democrats right now, you can invest in the grassroots organizing network that will propel candidates like Elizabeth to victory in 2020 and beyond.**

[Please chip in if you can to help hit this goal before midnight tomorrow.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852507b/45c30650/1c360129d/66e8d2c5/3032899937/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWF1ZzIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVTE5Rl9FT01fRUdSX1RfMjAyMDA4MzBfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-aug20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMU19F_EOM_EGR_T_20200830_V1S2_P")

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

name: Team Hawley
subject: FWD: Help Us Stop Socialism NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
If you happened to catch it a couple weeks ago, the Democrat Party's convention was an excellent reminder of the dangers that will come If you happened to catch it a couple weeks ago, the Democrat Party's convention was an excellent reminder of the dangers that will come with losing the Senate to socialists. In contrast, the Republican convention last week was full of hopeful messages of freedom, equality, and a belief in the American dream. This election is important. _**Our country cannot afford to embrace a government takeover and socialist agenda!**_ With only one day left, **we still have just over $2,000 to raise before our fundraising deadline hits at the end of August.** Today, we are asking you to help us defend America and stand up for our country’s future by making a difference — no matter how small. _**Please consider making a donation today to keep the Senate out of the hands of radical socialists.**_ All donations count, no matter the amount. [**DONATE _HERE_ to _Keep the Senate RED_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=5dbbd68ced33445bba2428a5fdccf6d1&_e=HBxuj5cY2XBH5ONg_wqwk08o02Xf6Nt_-n22c9KU7l4bV327OV5CdaZv_AVd-wjHXheik6by-6zvXKKv6Em32F6q-uAD1ZaeTOpEvFlltl_XH_Tv5f_uXHko5YYoUTEu67HNhWtb4W7lnYHnBQs1zPTOQsj-57K7fIo355zxtXBGGcE0XIdVE7A3jb34ljN3ikbd1g0xMrJjvJJcG3f9vsIhdzPsRqi5v_TscVwwBzMp0r9d4uE86stlEwRjtJ-p7B_TRvldtOYZJPqMZmzepfad56-_u7ZU7oFpFQ9_WnaaAQHFmnMxOuDdBgVFJhLwE3-pD1_ztjnQszPi2o7UeTYqVkp158pEZlBVISm-j2b2PUQd36lKjZ_0INo5rbnf2lQrvMUZN3qEuD8IpTpmrcwj2m_5BURXM05DWutgZgBW3-aecu6TDGwN9xm0EUrP) Thank you, Team Hawley \-------Forwarded message-------

name: Team Messner
subject: This Past Week: President Trump's NH visit, upcoming debate, and more.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to learn more >>
Veteran. Businessman. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/69322093dcdf73b5c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Volunteer](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/de093ac4dd85b847c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**Corky Greets President Trump, Gets Shout-Out from the Commander-in-Chief**

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/6d063f7197c63e64c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Corky was among hundreds of enthusiastic Granite Staters Friday night at Manchester-Boston Regional Airport when President Donald Trump touched down in Air Force One. With the presidential plane as his backdrop, the President spoke at length about the issues facing the nation. He was at times jocular and often serious, as he blasted his Democrat opponent, Joe Biden, and predicted a Trump win in November.
During his speech, he made special mention of Corky and his run for U.S. Senate, pointing to Corky in the crowd and telling him, “I heard you’re doing well, Corky!” **[Here’s the moment!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/d1eae68281603150c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**
Before the President’s arrival, **[Corky spoke to the assembled crowd](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/5117399fd59c2f1cc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** , saying how honored he was to be among those greeting the President. He also recounted the story of the day Mr. Trump endorsed his Senate run, and then the next day, the President was at West Point, congratulating Corky’s elder son, who was among the graduating cadets. “It was a special 24 hours for the Messner family,” he said, continuing, “and the way we’re going to thank President Trump for this endorsement is twofold: we are going to retire Jeanne Shaheen and retire her to her home to York, Maine...And we’re going to help President Trump win the four electoral votes in New Hampshire.”
|
---
**WMUR-Channel 9 U.S. Senate Debate Airs Sept. 1**
Be sure to tune in as WMUR-Channel 9 airs a debate featuring Republican U.S. Senate candidates Corky Messner and Don Bolduc, Tuesday, Sept. 1, at 7 p.m. The two canddidates will discuss the issues facing New Hampshire and the nation, and their efforts to unseat incumbent Senator Jeanne Shaheen.

|
---
**Corky is the Only Candidate for Federal Office Recommended by New Hampshire's Liberty Ballot**
Corky Messner is the only candidate for federal office this election year recommended by Liberty Ballot, a New Hampshire organization which supports candidates who champion small government.
“I am honored to be recommended by Liberty Ballot,” says Corky. “This group is dedicated to the idea of small government and self-determination and believes as I do in individual liberty and economic freedom for all Americans. I also am grateful for the support from these State Representatives and other loyal Republicans.”

Liberty Ballot evaluates candidates based on their small government stance and their viability. Those candidates are indicated by a marked ballot on the Liberty Ballot website, which lists ballots by city and town. For example, a Goffstown resident accessing the sample ballot on the Liberty Ballot site will see Corky selected, along with several other candidates.

The evaluation process includes dozens of activists who research ratings, endorsements, and pledges from organizations that include the New Hampshire Liberty Alliance, the Republican Liberty Caucus of New Hampshire, the New Hampshire Firearms Coalition, Gun Owners of New Hampshire, Americans for Prosperity New Hampshire, and New Hampshire Families for Education.

Candidate debates, websites, Facebook pages, literature and interviews also are considered as part of the evaluation process. Additionally, candidate viability is considered.
|
---
**The Violence Must End, Says Corky, As Senator Paul is Attacked Outside the White House**
Commenting on the video showing Kentucky U.S. Senator Rand Paul and his wife being threatened by a mob after leaving the White House the evening of President Trump’s acceptance speech, Corky strongly condemned the continuing unrest and violence in our cities.

Corky was endorsed by Senator Paul a few weeks ago.

“Minneapolis. Portland. Seattle. Washington. How long will the radical left continue to support rioters burning cities to the ground?” asks Corky. “Defunding the police is the LAST thing our communities need right now. They need security, protection, and safety. Not lawlessness and crime.”

He added: “President Trump is working hard to get these mobs under control, but politicians like D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are blocking him at every turn. We cannot allow Senator Shaheen perpetuate the violence and lawlessness across the country any longer.”
|
---
**More State Representatives and GOP Activists Sign on as Messner Endorsers**
Last week, we welcomed a new round of endorsements from State Representatives and noted GOP activists.
They include State Representatives Joe Alexander, Tom Dolan, Tony Lekas, Charlie McMahon, Mark Pearson, Steve Pearson, and Michael Yakobovich. Longtime GOP supporters endorsing Messner include former President of New Hampshire Right to Life Jane Cormier, Trump supporter Chau Kelley of Hooksett, and former N.H. House candidate Tommy Sharpe, Sr. of Windham.
"Having a Senator in Washington who will defend life and liberty is absolutely vital to the future of our Granite State," says Cormier. "Corky Messner will have my vote, and I hope he will have others' as well."

“I welcome this support as we approach the Sept. 8 primary, and we continue on to face Jeanne Shaheen in November’s general election,” Corky responded “Republicans across the Granite State understand this is a critical contest as we work to return conservative values and common sense to Washington.”
|
---
**Do You Have Your Absentee Ballot?**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/6f25e84f5aac410fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Every New Hampshire resident can vote absentee this year in the upcoming Sept. 8 primary. Skip the hectic election day lines and maintain social distancing! Check our **[website info](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b88c97fb96475010/738290af7bacd198c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to learn how you can vote absentee.
|

**Campaign Events Set for Around the State**
Among his upcoming stops:

Hampton Falls Republican Committee Candidates Forum
Tuesday, September 1, 6-7 pm
Smoky Quartz Distillery, 894 Lafayette Rd., Seabrook

Londonderry Fish & Game Club
Tuesday, September 1, 7:30-9 pm
Londonderry Fish and Game Club, 5 Lund St., Litchfield

Rolling Thunder event American Legion
Tuesday, September 1, 7:30-8:30 pm
American Legion, 38 Millville St., Salem

Brentwood Republican Town Committee
Wednesday, September 2, 6:30-7:30 pm
329 Rt 125, Brentwood

Check our website and Facebook page for more events as we continue the countdown to the primary!
|

How long will the radical left continue to support rioters burning cities to the ground?” asks Corky. “Defunding the police is the LAST thing our communities need right now. They need security, protection, and safety. Not lawlessness and crime.” He added: “President Trump is working hard to get these mobs under control, but politicians like D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are blocking him at every turn. We cannot allow Senator Shaheen perpetuate the violence and lawlessness across the country any longer.” | More State Representatives and GOP Activists Sign on as Messner Endorsers Last week, we welcomed a new round of endorsements from State Representatives and noted GOP activists. They include State Representatives Joe Alexander, Tom Dolan, Tony Lekas, Charlie McMahon, Mark Pearson, Steve Pearson, and Michael Yakobovich. Longtime GOP supporters endorsing Messner include former President of New Hampshire Right to Life Jane Cormier, Trump supporter Chau Kelley of Hooksett, and former N.H. House candidate Tommy Sharpe, Sr. of Windham. "Having a Senator in Washington who will defend life and liberty is absolutely vital to the future of our Granite State," says Cormier. "Corky Messner will have my vote, and I hope he will have others' as well." “I welcome this support as we approach the Sept. 8 primary, and we continue on to face Jeanne Shaheen in November’s general election,” Corky responded “Republicans across the Granite State understand this is a critical contest as we work to return conservative values and common sense to Washington.” | Do You Have Your Absentee Ballot? Every New Hampshire resident can vote absentee this year in the upcoming Sept. 8 primary. Skip the hectic election day lines and maintain social distancing! Check our to learn how you can vote absentee. | Campaign Events Set for Around the State Among his upcoming stops: Hampton Falls Republican Committee Candidates Forum Tuesday, September 1, 6-7 pm Smoky Quartz Distillery, 894 Lafayette Rd., Seabrook Londonderry Fish & Game Club Tuesday, September 1, 7:30-9 pm Londonderry Fish and Game Club, 5 Lund St., Litchfield Rolling Thunder event American Legion Tuesday, September 1, 7:30-8:30 pm American Legion, 38 Millville St., Salem Brentwood Republican Town Committee Wednesday, September 2, 6:30-7:30 pm 329 Rt 125, Brentwood Check our website and Facebook page for more events as we continue the countdown to the primary! | Get Your Corky Signs Today! An official Corky for Senate yard sign is a great way to show everyone where you stand and support the campaign! Request yours now before we run out! to learn more. | IMPORTANT CORONAVIRUS SUPPORT INFO HEALTH INFORMATION New Hampshire Department of Health & Human Services Fact Sheet – . clean_body: | | WEEK IN REVIEW Friend, 📺 #TeamMace is on TV! Our first television ad hit the airwaves on Monday morning. But we won’t stop there... This week I also had the opportunity to share our #LowcountryFirst message on ABC and CBS. 📰 Lowcountry First: 🇺🇸 America First foreign policy 💰 economic prosperity 🔐 security against lawlessness 💪🏼 support for our veterans 🍎 and educational opportunity. On Wednesday, Second Lady Karen Pence will campaign for us. Keep up with our Week in Review to hear from my team each week. Invite your friends and family to sign up at nancymace.org 📩 This Week on the Campaign Trail On Monday, our team released our FIRST television ad, called "Lowcountry Values." It features Nancy's mom and dad of Goose Creek, SC, and highlights her record of standing up for South Carolina taxpayers and advocating for veterans. Last week, Nancy challenged Congressman Cunningham to 5 debates. We have confirmed a debate just around the corner on October 6th. It’s time for Congressman Cunningham to defend his record of voting with Nancy Pelosi nearly 90% of the time. Representative Steve Scalise, the Republican Whip of the U.S. House of Representatives, visited with Nancy this week. Rep. Scalise, thank you for your support! Nancy joined Devin Dwyer to discuss WHY she is running for South Carolina's First Congressional District, and what putting the #LowcountryFirst means to her! Elaine interviewed Nancy on CBS News to discuss her record of getting things done, this week's Republican National Convention, and our path to VICTORY! | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Laura Loomer
subject: They’re trying to close our schools . . .
body:
What are working parents supposed to do?
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390798-921011-5168378-7321cc3a50-497adec2b0)
Patriot,

I just read a letter that my radical Democrat opponent, Lois Frankel, signed this week.

The letter was addressed to Florida Governor Ron DeSantis, demanding he continue to keep Palm Beach County Schools shut down due to Coronavirus.

Unlike Lois Frankel, I agree with our Governor. It’s time to send kids back to school!

Where is the common sense?

What are working parents supposed to do?

Put their kids in daycare – that is likely a WORSE environment without the educational aspects during the day?

Or do parents not work to stay home for virtual learning while running the risk of going hungry without a paycheck?

For Washington Elites like Frankel, it wouldn’t surprise me if they think, “Parents can just hire a full-time nanny if schools close.”

These are trying times for all of us. COVID is here. It’s not going away, and we have to choose between making the best choices for ourselves and our communities, or completely wrecking our economy and the future for everyone, especially our children.

It’s an easy choice – that Lois Frankel just DOES NOT understand.

Frankly, Frankel has to go.

[Help me send her packing by donating to my campaign today.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390798-921011-5168377-c7995b748e-497adec2b0)

In just four weeks, absentee ballots will start hitting mailboxes in my district.

We don’t have a day to waste. So if you haven’t done so already, [please chip in $10 or more right now and help me mobilize our ground game while persuading as many voters as we can online.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-390798-921011-5168377-c7995b748e-497adec2b0)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb23/2517740241/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb20/2517740241/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb21/2517740241/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb2d/2517740241/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb2f/2517740241/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b29b/18e32a7f/4a632957/7b20fb26/2517740241/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

name: Georgia HQ - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: we'll cut to the chase, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Our August deadline is approaching. |
---
Friend, we'll cut to the chase: **The last day of August is tomorrow, and we're behind on our monthly goal.**

**We need to raise _$42,000 by midnight tomorrow_ for Jon Ossoff to stay on track to win.**

**[Can you chip in any amount RIGHT NOW to make sure we can keep pace with the war chest of Jon's GOP opponent?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c517/594759515/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $10](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c516/594759515/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_10")** **[Express Donate: $25](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c519/594759515/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_25")** **[Express Donate: $50](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c518/594759515/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_50")** **[Express Donate: $75](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c51b/594759515/VEsD/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_75")** ****[Express Donate: $100](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c51a/594759515/VEsA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_100")**** ****[Or, donate another amount](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e248c/5b2c1286/380b2e5c/25f0c51d/594759515/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_30_eom_cut?express_lane_other=true&refcode=em_2020_08_30_eom_cut_ex_other")**** Friend, this is your opportunity to invest in the campaign of the Georgia Democrat who is going to determine control of the U.S. Senate.

Jon is neck and neck in the polls, and experts say the race is a complete toss-up. But we have all the momentum.

_And we have people like you, who make all the difference._

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: I'm looking for a few supporters from Pennsylvania tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If we hit our end-of-month goal by tomorrow night, we'll close the books on August in a position of strength. It's my first public deadline with Kamala. |
---

Hey Peter,

It's been a long week -- Donald Trump and the Republicans followed up our convention with four straight days of anger, divisiveness, and partisan fear mongering.

But I hope you're not feeling discouraged. I'm certainly not.

**Because, like I said over a week ago: Hope, love, and light are more powerful than hatred, fear, and darkness ever will be.**

I'm confident that with this message, we can show the world that hope trumps fear -- but we need to hit our fundraising goals to do that, and we came up a little short on our goal for the Republican convention.

That makes our current task all the more important, Peter. **If we hit our end-of-month goal by tomorrow night, we 'll close the books on August in a position of strength. It's my first public deadline with Kamala Harris on the ticket with me as my running mate, so this one is important to me.**

**[Now, I'm looking for a few supporters who can pitch in to help us raise just $225,000 more from Pennsylvania by tomorrow night. Can I count on you to be one of the folks I need to make a contribution of $25 tonight?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom_1?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B5_JRB_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B5_JRB_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
Lots of people are frightened about the direction this country is going, especially after what we saw this past week.

But together, Peter, we can give them hope next month, when our August fundraising numbers become public, that we're ready to win this race.

**[I hope you'll chip in tonight, if you're able.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_aug_eom_1?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B5_JRB_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.30_B5_JRB_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")**

Thank you so much, Peter,

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad6a/1013405435/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad69/1013405435/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad68/1013405435/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad67/1013405435/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad66/1013405435/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad65/1013405435/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad64/1013405435/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad63/1013405435/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad62/1013405435/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad61/1013405435/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad64/1013405435/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad60/1013405435/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad63/1013405435/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b092/1cd0ac28/154073045/3570ad5f/1013405435/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President
